role: Staff Technical Program Manager — Data Connectivity Platform
description: Led the Activation organization on LiveRamp's data connectivity platform, driving cross-team programs spanning release management, CI/CD, velocity, and vulnerability scanning.
achievements: Directed cross-team and dependency alignment, defining clear and predictable processes to launch LiveRamp's Authenticated Traffic Solution (ATS) Forecasting tool — enabling a 20% increase in client adoption.
Led a cost-tracking program that increased coverage of $55M+ yearly GCP customer cost from 25% to 60%.
Spearheaded planning, road mapping, and review preparation across Engineering, Product Intelligence, and Finance.
Drove API integration, onboarding, support, and documentation programs that streamlined cross-team execution.
Partnered with executive leadership (CTO, Head of TPM, Head of Product) to align team KPIs with company initiatives.
